'''yawaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadhead|roadhead]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-w-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadhead|roadhead]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yawaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæwæjæth|yæwæjæth]] || [[word:yæwæjæj|yæwæjæj]] || [[word:yæwæjæsh|yæwæjæsh]] || [[word:yæwæjæ|yæwæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yawawajath|yawawajath]] || [[word:yawawajaj|yawawajaj]] || [[word:yawawajash|yawawajash]] || [[word:yawawaja|yawawaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yawajath|yawajath]] || [[word:yawajaj|yawajaj]] || [[word:yawajash|yawajash]] || [[word:yawaja|yawaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yawafjath|yawafjath]] || [[word:yawafjaj|yawafjaj]] || [[word:yawafjash|yawafjash]] || [[word:yawafjaf|yawafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yawajatha|yawajatha]] || [[word:yawajaja|yawajaja]] || [[word:yawajasha|yawajasha]] || [[word:yawajaka|yawajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yawajath|yawajath]] || [[word:yawajaj|yawajaj]] || [[word:yawajash|yawajash]] || [[word:yawaja|yawaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yawajathal|yawajathal]] || [[word:yawajajal|yawajajal]] || [[word:yawajashal|yawajashal]] || [[word:yawajakal|yawajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yawajathatha|yawajathatha]] || [[word:yawajajaja|yawajajaja]] || [[word:yawajashasha|yawajashasha]] || [[word:yawajaka|yawajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yawajathan|yawajathan]] || [[word:yawajajan|yawajajan]] || [[word:yawajashan|yawajashan]] || [[word:yawajakan|yawajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yawajathaoro|yawajathaoro]] || [[word:yawajajaoro|yawajajaoro]] || [[word:yawajashaoro|yawajashaoro]] || [[word:yawajakaoro|yawajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
